TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tony_Tan, title = Tony_Tan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tony_Tan} }

S.FORM: I 1940 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 7 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tony Tan, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Singapore anini i ci Tony Tan, patirengan a romi'ad i 2011 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i to~unj tan, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u siŇčapo~ur…ô anini i ¶i to~unj tan, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1940 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 7 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tony Tan, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Singapore anini i ci Tony Tan, patirengan a romi'ad i 2011 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
